title: Outcome dashboard (adoptions + reuse events)
context: The project's success metrics are outcome-based: adoption by named educators, learners reached (partner-reported), and verifiable reuse events — not download counts. These outcomes are recorded in the project's outcome ledger (a committed file, not analytics). A static outcome dashboard that reads this ledger and displays confirmed adoptions and reuse events makes the project's impact visible to potential partners, donors, and the broader open-education community, without collecting or displaying any individual user data.
objective: Build a static, client-side outcome dashboard that reads the committed outcome ledger and displays confirmed adoptions, partner-reported learner counts, and verifiable reuse events — with no backend, no individual tracking, and no analytics beyond the ledger entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Static, client-side dashboard reads the committed outcome ledger (a structured JSON or Markdown file in the repo) and displays: confirmed adoptions (partner name/org, date, script/template used), partner-reported learner counts (opt-in only), and verifiable reuse events.
No backend, no individual user analytics, no tracking — all data comes from the committed ledger.
Dashboard is accessible (keyboard navigation, color contrast WCAG 2.1 AA) and legible on mobile.
No PII collected or displayed: learner counts are aggregate, partner-reported, opt-in; no individual learner names or data.
Dashboard deployable as a static page alongside the web preview (preview-018).
pnpm build && pnpm test && pnpm lint pass; DCO signed-off.
resources: PLAN.md section 4 (Success metrics — outcome-based, not vanity downloads; anti-metric),  section 14 (security & privacy — no analytics that profile individuals)
adoption-020 (outcome ledger entries that feed the dashboard)
preview-018 (static web preview to co-deploy with)
output: A static outcome dashboard committed to the repo and deployable alongside the web preview — committed via PR with DCO sign-off.
